what: Build comprehensive audit report with issues and recommendations
why: Provide actionable summary of vault health for user review
output: Audit report object with categorized issues, severity levels, and fix recommendations

success_handling.criteria: Audit report is generated with all findings from previous steps consolidated

error_handling.criteria: Unexpected error during report formatting or file write
error_handling.action: Return raw audit findings as fallback

event.message: Report generation failed, returning raw findings: {error}
